title: SignedEnvelope
description: A DSSE-compatible envelope wrapping a canonical unsigned event payload with one or more signatures. See ACT-1.0.md section 4.2.

payload.description: The unsigned event payload, in-band for local/embedded use. Wire transport MAY instead base64-encode this per raw DSSE; both representations MUST hash identically once canonicalized.

payloadDigest.description: SHA-256 digest of the RFC 8785 canonical bytes of payload. This is the event_id.

signature.description: base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the DSSE PAE(payloadType, canonical payload bytes) construction, per https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse/blob/master/protocol.md
